_comment: Virginia Retirement System (VRS) pension plan parameters. Comprehensive state-level reference covering Plan 1, Plan 2, Hybrid, SPORS, VaLORS, and enhanced hazardous duty.
membershipNote: VRS is the 14th largest US public/private pension fund and 42nd largest worldwide. Over 832 participating employers including state agencies, public schools, political subdivisions, colleges/universities, state police, law officers, and judiciary.

hireDateMapping.label: VRS Plan 1
hireDateMapping.note: Membership date prior to Jul 1, 2010 AND vested (5 yrs) before Jan 1, 2013 AND no refund taken

hireDateMapping.label: VRS Plan 2
hireDateMapping.note: Membership date Jul 1, 2010 - Dec 31, 2013. Also: pre-Jul 2010 members NOT vested by Jan 1, 2013.

hireDateMapping.label: VRS Hybrid Retirement Plan
hireDateMapping.note: Membership date on/after Jan 1, 2014. Also Plan 1/2 members who opted in during 2014 election window. NOT eligible: SPORS, VaLORS, or political subdivision enhanced hazardous duty employees.

vrs_plan1.closedNote: Closed to new members. Existing Plan 1 members who were vested by Jan 1, 2013 remain.

formula.description: 1.7% x AFC x years of service

cola.formula: First 3% of CPI-U + half of any additional increase up to 4%
cola.effectiveDate: July 1 after one full calendar year from retirement date
cola.note: Max 5%. CPI-U = Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers.

disability.note: 1.7% on all service credit regardless of when earned. Most state employees covered under VSDP.

plop.eligibility: Work at least 1 year beyond unreduced retirement eligibility
plop.amounts: 1x, 2x, or 3x annual benefit depending on years worked beyond eligibility

survivorOptions.note: Member benefit reduced; survivor receives elected percentage for life

vrs_plan2.closedNote: Closed to new members hired on/after Jan 1, 2014 (those go to Hybrid). Existing Plan 2 members remain.

formula.description: 1.65% on service earned/purchased/granted on/after Jan 1, 2013; 1.7% on service before Jan 1, 2013

eligibility.normalRetirementAge: Social Security normal retirement age (66-67 based on birth year)

cola.formula: First 2% of CPI-U + half of any additional increase up to 2%
cola.effectiveDate: July 1 after one full calendar year from retirement date

disability.note: 1.65% on all service credit regardless of when earned.

plop.eligibility: Work at least 1 year beyond unreduced retirement eligibility

vrs_hybrid.note: Combines DB pension + DC investment account. Not available to SPORS, VaLORS, or enhanced hazardous duty employees.

definedBenefit.description: 1.0% x AFC x years of service (for service on/after Jan 1, 2014)
definedBenefit.multiplierNote: Members who opted in from Plan 1/2: prior service uses original multiplier (1.7%/1.65%)

employerMatch.note: Employer matches voluntary contributions up to 2.5%

vesting.note: Employer contributions vest on schedule. Employee contributions always 100% vested.

contributions.employer: actuarially determined (DB) + 1% mandatory + up to 2.5% match (DC)

vesting.note: DB component. DC has separate vesting schedule.

cola.formula: Same as Plan 2: first 2% of CPI-U + half of additional up to 2%
cola.note: Applies to DB component only. DC component has no COLA.
cola.effectiveDate: July 1 after one full calendar year from retirement date

disability.note: State employees in Hybrid covered under VSDP. Political subdivision/school members covered under VLDP or comparable employer plan. Hybrid members not eligible for disability retirement.

hazardousDuty._comment: Enhanced retirement benefits for law enforcement, state police, fire/rescue, and other eligible hazardous duty positions

SPORS.name: State Police Officers' Retirement System
SPORS.note: State Police officers only. 1.85% multiplier on all service.

VaLORS.name: Virginia Law Officers' Retirement System
VaLORS.note: Members hired/rehired after Jul 1, 2001 get 2.0% multiplier but NO hazardous duty supplement. Pre-7/1/2001 members could elect 1.7% + supplement or 2.0% without.

politicalSubdivisionEnhanced.name: Enhanced Benefits for Political Subdivision Hazardous Duty Employees
politicalSubdivisionEnhanced.sheriffs: 1.85% (mandatory for sheriffs and regional jail superintendents)
politicalSubdivisionEnhanced.coveredPositions: Sheriffs, deputy sheriffs, firefighters, fire medics, regional jail superintendents, and other eligible positions as elected by employer
politicalSubdivisionEnhanced.note: Political subdivisions make irrevocable election to provide enhanced benefits. Members are Plan 1 or Plan 2 (NOT eligible for Hybrid).

hazardousDutySupplement.eligibility: 20+ years of hazardous duty service credit in SPORS, VaLORS (with 1.7% election), or political subdivision enhanced position
hazardousDutySupplement.payableUntil: Social Security normal retirement age (or age 65 for VaLORS members)
hazardousDutySupplement.adjustmentSchedule: Reviewed every 2 years; increased by applicable Social Security COLAs
hazardousDutySupplement.notEligible: VaLORS members with 2.0% multiplier (hired/rehired after Jul 1, 2001)
hazardousDutySupplement.history: First established 1966 at $1,620/year for SPORS. Extended to local law enforcement in 1970 and VaLORS in 1999.

healthInsuranceCredit.eligibility: 15+ years of creditable service at retirement

stateEmployees.note: $4.25/month per year of service. Increased from $4.00 effective Jul 1, 2024.

politicalSubdivision.note: $1.50/month per year of service, max $45/month. Higher if employer elected $1.00 enhancement.

healthInsuranceCredit.note: Assists with single health insurance premiums. Applied to benefit payment.

groupLifeInsurance.activeCoverage: Salary rounded to next $1,000 then doubled (natural death) or quadrupled (accidental death)
groupLifeInsurance.retireeCoverage: Reduces 25% per year to minimum of 25% of original. Minimum for 30+ years service: $9,768/year (as of Jul 1, 2025).
groupLifeInsurance.note: Optional Group Life Insurance also available for purchase.
